title: The Suncat Express
description: The Suncat Express is a modpack for the Harpy Express with map voting and more!
body: # The Suncat Express The Suncat Express is a modified version of the modpack *The Harpy Express: Extended*, which itself is a modification of the original *The Last Voyage of the Harpy Express* modpack by the YouTuber and modder Doctor4t. **It adds:** - Map voting - Lots of new roles - New decoration blocks - VR support - Blood - More animations You can also join our Discord server to play with our 350+ members!
